hooks.command:
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get(\"command\", \"\")
dangers = [
  r\"rm\s+-rf\",
  r\"git\s+push\s+--force\",
  r\"git\s+reset\s+--hard\",
  r\"DROP\s+TABLE\",
  r\"DROP\s+DATABASE\",
  r\"truncate\s+table\",
]
for p in dangers:
  if re.search(p, cmd, re.IGNORECASE):
    print(f\"BLOCKED: dangerous command detected: {p}\")
    sys.exit(1)
print(\"OK\")
"'
npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
